description: Tests if an outcome contains a card of a specified rank. Used as a predicate inside event() with card sample spaces. The rank is matched after stripping suit symbols from card values.

examples.expression:
S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), cards())
E = event(S, rank("A"), fc(gold))

S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), cards())
E = event(S, rank("K"), fc(purple))

S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), cards(hearts))
E = event(S, rank(10), fc(tomato))
